input: Create a FamilyDogIllustration showing Maple the golden doodle sitting in a meadow
Create a BeehiveIllustration for a future apiary section — hive boxes, flowers, bees
failures: COMPLETE_SCENE: The SVG code is truncated mid-comment at '/* ELEMENTS 14-16:' — the flowers on the right side are incomplete, the bees are never rendered, and the closing tags for the SVG and function are missing. The component would fail to compile and the scene is not fully drawn.

input: Add a ChickenCoopIllustration — small wooden structure, nesting boxes visible through door, chickens on roost
failures: PAPER_CUTOUT_STYLE: The illustration uses gradients-free flat shapes but lacks the distinct layered paper cut-out depth planes (sky background, mid-ground, foreground terrain as separate colored layers). The background is missing entirely — there is no sky fill covering the canvas. Shapes are rendered more as architectural diagram elements than stacked paper silhouette layers at distinct depth planes.

COMPLETE_SCENE: The SVG code is truncated — it ends mid-line with 'stroke="#6B' indicating the output was cut off. The scene is incomplete: no sky/background fill exists (the canvas above the ground rect is empty/black void), and the last wood beam detail line is unfinished. The viewBox is not fully filled with content.

input: Add a new MealsIllustration for the Provisions page — a cozy kitchen scene with a cast iron pot, wooden cutting board, and fresh herbs
failures: PAPER_CUTOUT_STYLE: The illustration uses simple geometric shapes (rectangles, ellipses, lines) but does not achieve the paper cut-out layered aesthetic. There are no distinct flat color planes stacked at recognizable depth levels (e.g., wall plane, counter plane, object plane each as a bold flat shape). The pot is rendered with a basic ellipse + path that reads more as a minimal diagram than a paper cut-out silhouette. The herbs are thin lines and tiny circles rather than chunky flat leaf shapes. The cutting board lacks paper-cutout character. Fewer than 4 visually distinct layered flat shapes in different palette colors are clearly present in the composition.

input: Update the CottageIllustration to add a wood pile stacked against the side wall
failures: paper_cutout_style: The illustration uses plain rectangles, ellipses, and polygons but lacks the distinct paper cut-out layered aesthetic. There are no clearly stacked flat colored shape layers at distinct depth planes — the 'far hill' ellipse bleeds into background placement, and the ground is a plain rectangle. The shapes don't read as paper layers cut and stacked; they read as basic geometric primitives. Additionally, the palette uses hardcoded hex colors rather than tokens from a defined P palette.

color_variety: The illustration relies almost entirely on muted earth tones and greens (#E8F4F8, #B8D4A8, #9CBF7F, #D4A574, #8B6F47, #6B4423) with only a single light blue window accent (#A8D8EA). There are no warm accent colors (amber, rust, cream, or equivalent light/warm values) used meaningfully across foreground elements, and no dark layer1/layer2 background values are present. The color range is narrow and lacks the required dark-to-light contrast spectrum.
